name: Distribution Unpack and Smoke Verification
decision_reason: scripts/smoke-linux-saga-dist verifies checksum, Saga/ archive root, clean temporary unpack, required unpacked files/executable bits, and limited unpacked help commands. The smoke report is passed-with-limitations, keeps verified=false, records wrapper/editor limitations, and does not claim production, enterprise, verified final release, full distribution verification, full editor workflow, Visual Blocks UI, or cloud collaboration readiness.
